name: rushing/laravel-graphine
description: A pluggable Laravel graph-substrate seam: the GraphStore contract + role sub-contracts + value types + one in-memory reference driver + a conformance test-kit. Ships zero persistence drivers — real drivers are the consumer's, authored over its own wheel.

suggest.graphp/graph: MIT — pure-PHP in-memory graph algorithms behind the reference driver (roles 1/2)
suggest.staudenmeir/laravel-adjacency-list: MIT — recursive-CTE trees AND graphs; for a CONSUMER's relational driver (roles 1-3), not shipped here
suggest.laudis/neo4j-php-client: MIT Bolt client → Neo4j server behind a network boundary; for a consumer's Neo4j driver (role 3)
suggest.sweetrdf/easyrdf: BSD-3 — SPARQL 1.1 client; for a consumer's RDF-query driver (role 3)
suggest.nikic/php-parser: BSD-3 — AST scanner behind the seam guard a consumer runs over its own App\Graph\Drivers
